name: Flaky Beef Turnovers
recipeIngredient: 2 small Potatoes, peeled and diced into very small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (205°C).
2. Trim the beef and discard any fat.
3. Cut the beef into cubes no larger than 1/2 inch.
4. In a medium bowl, combine the beef, potatoes, onion-soup mix, ketchup, Worcestershire sauce, and parsley.
5. On a lightly floured board, roll out each pastry shell to a 7-inch circle.
6. Spoon equal amounts (about 1/4 cup) of meat mixture onto each rolled-out shell.
7. Brush the edges with water.
8. Fold over the shells; press with tines of a fork to seal.
9. Cut several slits in the top of each turnover.
10. Place on a baking sheet and bake for 20 to 25 minutes, or until golden brown. Serve hot. Makes 6 turnovers.
